overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a third-person perspective of a character walking through Night City. The clip opens with a brief highway overpass view before following the character through sunlit urban streets, past neon-signed buildings, and toward a massive corporate skyscraper surrounded by construction cranes.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway overpass with metal trusses

agents.ego_description: stationary camera observing traffic from the roadside near an industrial bridge

notable_agents.action: blue van driving along the highway from left to right

entered.detail: large rusted metal truss bridge spanning across the highway
thick industrial concrete and metal pillars supporting the overpass
futuristic skyscrapers visible through haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a stationary view of an industrial highway overpass. Metal trusses and support pillars dominate the foreground while a blue van drives past on the road below. The distant futuristic skyline is visible through the hazy afternoon light.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city sidewalk with mixed residential buildings

events.description: camera cuts from highway overpass to third-person perspective following a character walking on city sidewalk

agents.ego_description: third-person character walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing palm trees and urban infrastructure

entered.detail: massive futuristic black skyscraper dominating the skyline ahead
distinctive yellow building with large mural graffiti on the facade
palm trees lining the sidewalk edge
wide concrete pedestrian walkway with red painted curbs

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to follow a character walking along a sunlit city sidewalk. A massive dark skyscraper looms ahead in the distance while a distinctive yellow building with graffiti stands to the left. Palm trees line the right side of the walkway as the character moves steadily forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with commercial storefronts

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk and crosses the street
passing the KENDACHI building with prominent red signage overhead

agents.ego_description: character crosses the street and navigates through a busier pedestrian area with increased foot traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with wide-brimmed hat walking past the camera in the opposite direction

entered.detail: low commercial building with prominent red KENDACHI signage on the roof
white painted lines marking the pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
tall pole with traffic signals and pedestrian crossing lights
yellow construction cranes visible in the distance against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at an intersection, entering a busier commercial area. The KENDACHI building with its red signage becomes prominent on the left while construction cranes appear in the distant right background. Pedestrians walk in various directions as the character navigates the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corridor leading to corporate skyscraper with active construction

events.description: entering a narrower street corridor with buildings on both sides approaching the massive skyscraper

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward the towering corporate skyscraper, passing industrial buildings and construction equipment

notable_agents.action: woman in green shorts walking along the sidewalk

entered.detail: gray concrete building with industrial architecture and graffiti
large external HVAC units and ventilation pipes on building facade
metal security fencing blocking off the construction area ahead

segments.scene_description: The street narrows into a corridor flanked by industrial buildings as the character approaches the massive dark skyscraper. Construction cranes tower prominently on the right side, now much closer. The environment becomes more enclosed with the sky partially blocked by the towering structures ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a distant industrial overlook into the dense, towering heart of a futuristic city. It begins with a stationary view of a highway overpass where metal trusses frame a blue van driving below against a hazy skyline. As the perspective shifts to follow a character on foot, the scene opens onto a sunlit sidewalk lined with palm trees and graffiti-covered buildings, moving steadily toward a looming dark skyscraper. The camera then navigates a busy intersection, passing the red signage of the Kendachi building as construction cranes emerge in the distance. Finally, the street narrows into an enclosed industrial corridor, with the massive skyscraper and towering cranes dominating the view as the sky is blocked by the surrounding architecture.
